source: IMC Round 2 Backtest Leaderboard (open-source aggregator, participant-uploaded)
scope: Round 2 backtest submissions, de-duplicated by trader.py hash
notes: This is the best available proxy for the MAF denominator: 3,065 de-duplicated trader.py submissions
PnL in simu-TEST units. Multiply by ~8.9 for simu-FINALE equivalence.
96% profitable → most teams at least match buy-and-hold / simple MM
552 'low outliers' below view likely include non-functional or actively bad strategies
